coverage_note: The bundled ERBB2 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from ERBB2 HER2 receptor dimer signaling, MAPK/PI3K activation, amplification biology, and anti-HER2 therapy response and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000141736: ERBB2 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: ERBB2 findings should be read against HER2 receptor dimer signaling, MAPK/PI3K activation, amplification biology, and anti-HER2 therapy response; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.
ERBB2 amplification model is curated as a ERBB2 marker for HER2-amplified oncology context, ErbB receptor signaling; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

ERBB2 activating kinase-domain model is curated as a ERBB2 marker for HER2-amplified oncology context, ErbB receptor signaling; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
